_crons_note: Hermes manages crons natively (hermes cron). The cortextOS daemon SKIPS its external scheduler for runtime=hermes, so cortextOS-style crons here would be dead/misleading. The recurring heartbeat is a Hermes-native --no-agent cron that runs cortextos bus update-heartbeat (see HEARTBEAT.md / AGENTS.md).
_model_note: Hermes selects its own model via ~/.hermes config.yaml (`hermes model`); HermesPTY passes no --model. cortextOS does not set the model for this runtime.
